message: I'm very price-sensitive and patient. Low asks will get trades; high asks likely mean no deal. Best chance is to start modest and avoid holding out for big prices.
I appreciate your patience. To ensure trades, I'll keep asks reasonable, but I must cover costs. Let's aim for prices above 85.
No trade at 90. If you want consistent deals, asks in the low-to-mid 80s are much more likely; above 86 I’m comfortable waiting.
I'll lower my ask to mid-80s. A price around 85 benefits both. Let's trade.
85 worked once, but for repeat trades I need a bit more surplus. If asks are 83-84, I'll likely keep buying; at 85+ I may sit out and wait.
To encourage repeated trades, I'll set my ask at 84. I hope you'll bid 85 so we can trade at a price that benefits us both.
84 was acceptable, but for steady repeat trades I need 83. If your ask is 83, I'll be inclined to buy again; higher asks make me more likely to wait.
I'll ask 83 this round to keep trading steady. Let's both benefit from consistent deals.
83 worked, but for continued buying I need 82. If you ask 82, I'll likely keep bidding; 83+ and I may pause.
I'll ask 82 to keep trading steady. Let's both benefit from consistent deals.
I've accommodated your requests, but at 82 my profit is minimal. Let's trade at 83 to keep both satisfied.
I've paid down each round; to keep buying consistently, 82 is my ceiling. At 83 I'm likely to sit out and wait for a better ask.
Round 6 showed 83 doesn't clear. My ceiling remains 82; if you ask 82 this round, I'll bid to trade. Higher and I'll wait.
I'll ask 82 this round to trade. But for future rounds, I need at least 83 to maintain profit. Let's cooperate for mutual benefit.
I'm still bidding 82 this round. If your ask is 82, we trade immediately; if it's 83 or higher, I'll wait again. Steady 82 clears.
I'll ask 82 this round. For future rounds, I need at least 83 to maintain profit. Let's trade at 83 from next round for mutual benefit.
I will ask 83 this round. My profit at 82 is minimal. To continue trading, bid 83 for mutual benefit.
83 failed already; 82 cleared four times. My bid ceiling remains 82 this round and going forward—if you ask 82, we trade immediately; at 83 I wait. Volume at 82 beats no sale at 83.
82 is my firm ceiling through the remaining rounds. It cleared six times; 83 failed. Ask 82 and we trade now. Ask 83+ and I wait.
Agreed. I'll ask 82. Let's trade all remaining rounds at 82.
Sticking to 82 through the end. Ask 82 and we trade every round immediately; ask 83+ and I wait. Let's keep the remaining rounds clearing at 82.
I'll ask 82 each round as agreed. Let's trade all remaining rounds.
Continuing with ask 82 as agreed. Let's trade this round and all remaining rounds for mutual benefit.
Good—I'm bidding 82 again. If you keep asking 82, we clear every remaining round; if you move above 82, I won't trade.
I'm bidding 82 again. Keep ask at 82 and we clear every remaining round; any ask above 82 means no trade from me.
I'll ask 82 as agreed. Let's trade.
I'm bidding 82 again. Ask 82 and we clear every remaining round; any ask above 82 means no trade from me.
Agreed. I'll keep asking 82. Let's trade every round.
I will ask 82 as agreed. Let's trade all remaining rounds for mutual benefit.
I'm bidding 82 again. Keep ask at 82 and we clear every remaining round; any ask above 82 means no trade from me.
I'll ask 82 as agreed. Let's trade all remaining rounds.
I'm bidding 82 again. Keep ask at 82 and we clear every remaining round; any ask above 82 means no trade from me.
I will ask 82 as agreed. Let's trade all remaining rounds.
I'm bidding 82 again. Ask 82 and we clear all remaining rounds; any ask above 82 means no trade from me.
Final three rounds, I'm at 81 now. Ask 81 and we clear; 82+ risks no trade.
I will ask 82 as per our agreement. Let's trade at 82 for mutual benefit. Changing to 81 leaves me no profit.
Let's finish smoothly: I'll bid 82 again this round and next. Keep asking 82 and we clear both remaining rounds; any higher risks an unnecessary miss.
Agreed. I will ask 82 this round and next to clear both rounds. Let's trade smoothly.
Final round: I'm bidding 81 only. Ask 81 and we clear; 82 means no deal from me.
We agreed on 82 for both final rounds. I'm asking 82. If you bid 81, no trade and both lose. Let's close with a win-win at 82.
